title: Text Deduplicator
description: Remove duplicate lines from text. Preserves order with case-insensitive matching and whitespace trimming. Free tool.
placeholder: Paste text with duplicate lines here...

howToUse.label: Paste your text
howToUse.description: Paste the text with duplicate lines into the left area. Works great for lists, URLs, log entries, and more.

howToUse.label: Configure options
howToUse.description: Choose whether to use case-sensitive matching, trim whitespace, or remove empty lines.

howToUse.label: Copy the result
howToUse.description: The deduplicated text appears on the right, preserving the original order. Click Copy to copy to clipboard.

faq.question: Does this preserve the original line order?
faq.answer: Yes. This tool keeps lines in their original order, retaining the first occurrence of each duplicate and removing subsequent ones. Use text-sorter if you also need to sort.

faq.question: Can I treat uppercase and lowercase as the same?
faq.answer: Yes. Uncheck 'Case sensitive' to treat 'Apple', 'apple', and 'APPLE' as duplicates. The default is case-insensitive.

faq.question: What does 'Trim whitespace' do?
faq.answer: When enabled, leading and trailing spaces are removed from each line before comparison, so '  apple  ' and 'apple' are treated as duplicates.

faq.question: How is this different from the Text Sorter?
faq.answer: Text Sorter sorts lines and optionally removes duplicates. This tool removes duplicates without sorting, preserving the original order.

faq.question: How many lines can it handle?
faq.answer: The tool runs entirely in your browser and can handle tens of thousands of lines without any issues. No data is sent to a server.
